title: SHATCHI 14 Gram Pink & Silver Happy Birthday Confetti Table Scatter Glitz Sprinkles Stardust Bday Party Decorations For Kids Adults, (SHATCHI - 180)
features: 🎊 Pack Includes: Each bag contain 14 gram pink and silver confetti, sparkling assortment foil confetti Happy Birthday Shape Design.
🎊 Design & Material: Glittering with metallic texture, has high luster and color retention, will add fun atmosphere to your party with clear cut happy birthday design.

🎊 Occasion: A nice and easy way to decorate table tops. Perfect for Birthday parties. Not only for Kids but every age of person will love this. Share joys of your special memorable day with your family and friends.

🎊 Use: Spread them on table, gifts, cards, party invitations, scrapbooks, prom, craft works, make your party interesting and unforgettable. Also nice to be applied together with other decorative supplies like banners, cupcake toppers,etc.
🎊 Colour: pink and silver, Size: 2.9cm wide approx.
